prerequisites: A HiBob (Bob) account with API access enabled.
A service user created in Bob, which provides a service user ID and token. If you cannot access the Service Users section yourself, ask a Bob Admin to generate the credentials for you.
The service user token, which is only copyable at the moment it is generated. Store it securely.
Decide which environment to target. Set is_sandbox to true to use HiBob's Sandbox server, or false for Production. Sandbox is available only for accounts that have purchased the Sandbox capability.

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic Authentication (service user ID and token)
authMethods.summary: HiBob authenticates API calls with HTTP Basic Auth. Enter the service user ID as the username field and the service user token as the password field. HiBob combines the two as service-user-id:token, Base64-encodes the result, and sends it in the Authorization: Basic header.

setupSteps.title: Create a service user in Bob
setupSteps.body: In Bob, open the Service Users section and create a service user. Bob generates a service user ID and a token. Copy the token immediately, since it can only be copied at the time it is generated. If you do not have access to the Service Users section, ask a Bob Admin to generate the credentials for you.

setupSteps.title: Provide the credentials to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the service user ID in the username field and the service user token in the password field. These are used together for HTTP Basic Authentication against the HiBob API.

setupSteps.title: Select the environment
setupSteps.body: Set is_sandbox to true to connect to HiBob's Sandbox server, or false to connect to Production. Sandbox access requires an account that has purchased the Sandbox capability.
